gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the greenhouse, updating the latest health checks and metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest usage and health statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a gardener's hat watering plants in a greenhouse, while the Monitor Robot checks off a list. Represents the automated daily health checks of the community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a clipboard with green checkmarks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a clipboard with green checkmarks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background.
